children.text: requests to the Internal Revenue Service for ruling letters, opinion letters, and determination letters, and

children.label: A
children.text: shall vary according to categories (or subcategories) established by the Secretary,

children.label: B
children.text: shall be determined after taking into account the average time for (and difficulty of) complying with requests in each category (and subcategory), and

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall provide for such exemptions (and reduced fees) under such program as the Secretary determines to be appropriate.

children.heading: Exemption for certain requests regarding pension plans
children.label: B Exemption for certain requests regarding pension plans
I
children.text: the fifth plan year the pension benefit plan is in existence, or

children.label: II
children.text: the end of any remedial amendment period with respect to the plan beginning within the first 5 plan years, or

children.label: ii
children.text: made by the sponsor of any prototype or similar plan which the sponsor intends to market to participating employers.

children.heading: Pension benefit plan
children.label: i Pension benefit plan
children.text: The term “pension benefit plan” means a pension, profit-sharing, stock bonus, annuity, or employee stock ownership plan.

children.heading: Eligible employer
children.label: ii Eligible employer
children.text: The term “eligible employer” means an eligible employer (as defined in section 408(p)(2)(C)(i)(I)) which has at least 1 employee who is not a highly compensated employee (as defined in section 414(q)) and is participating in the plan. The determination of whether an employer is an eligible employer under subparagraph (B) shall be made as of the date of the request described in such subparagraph.

children.heading: Determination of average fees charged
children.label: iii Determination of average fees charged
children.text: For purposes of any determination of average fees charged, any request to which subparagraph (B) applies shall not be taken into account.

children.heading: Average fee requirement
children.label: 3 Average fee requirement
children.text: The average fee charged under the program required by subsection (a) shall not be less than the amount determined under the following table:AverageCategoryFeeEmployee plan ruling and opinion$250Exempt organization ruling$350Employee plan determination$300Exempt organization determination$275Chief counsel ruling$200.

children.heading: Certified professional employer organizations
children.label: 4 Certified professional employer organizations
children.text: The fee charged under the program in connection with the certification by the Secretary of a professional employer organization under section 7705 shall be an annual fee not to exceed $1,000 per year.
